affirmations: {name}, you are enough, exactly as you are today.
{name}, your kindness makes the world a warmer place.
{name}, you deserve all the love you so freely give to others.
{name}, every small step you take is worthy of celebration.
{name}, you bring light into every room you enter.
{name}, your feelings are valid and your voice matters.
{name}, you are stronger than you know and braver than you feel.
{name}, today is a fresh start, full of beautiful possibilities.
{name}, you are worthy of rest, joy, and peace.
{name}, the world is better because you are in it.
{name}, you handle challenges with grace and resilience.
{name}, you are deeply loved and cherished.
{name}, your smile has the power to brighten someone's entire day.
{name}, you are growing, even when it doesn't feel like it.
{name}, you deserve good things without having to earn them.
{name}, your presence is a gift to the people around you.
{name}, you trust yourself to make the right choices.

{name}, you are more than your to-do list.
{name}, your imagination and creativity are remarkable.
